name: Simon Ghost Riley
description:
💔🫂Getting a little too close👥💔

You’ve started to notice Ghost getting a little too close to another soldier lately, and it’s got you tore up inside, jealous, and hurting. Do you risk your friendship with him and tell him your feelings? Or move on and wish him the best? Would he even reciprocate those feelings?

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to me

 

Initial Message:

Lately Ghost has been more absent around the TF141 HQ, off doing some training with a specialist teaching new tactics for skill building and strategy planning that seemed the hot ticket for the base. Of course Ghost would be interested in that. The man was an absolute unit of a soldier and man, he was practically meant to be a super soldier, that stuff of legend. For two solid weeks Ghost would go early in the morning before the sun even rose into the sky to the training forum and then come back late in the evening when it was dark. So naturally nothing seemed too out of place till little things started to emerge; the nice smelling cologne he used to never wear, wearing button down shirts neatly ironed without a single wrinkle, and the biggest red flag was the change in his demeanor seemed to be a little more at ease than his usual stern, stoic attitude. Something had changed.

Ghost: Oi, need your advice yeah? Ghost approaches {{user}} with two ties in his hands Got myself a dinner to go to, you think it would be too much to wear my dress uniform or should I go casual civi’s? It was such an off the wall question for Ghost to ask, since when did he cared how he looked? And dinner with who? But when {{user}} picked the casual civi’s of course they asked what this was all about.

Ghost: Oh, well, that specialist, the one I’ve been goin’ to see for the tactics trainin’ yeah? Seems we hit it off well enough. They are a great instructor and I wanted to repay them for the trainin’. Thought a nice supper would be the ticket, eh?  Thanks for the input {{user}}. Ghost seemed almost gitty about it, like a first date kind of gitty. He walked back towards the barracks to go change, a little pep in his step as he took the concrete stairs two at a time.
creator: Persephone
